## Checklist

- [ ] One concern per PR (no unrelated refactors bundled in)
- [ ] `setup.sh` re-run cleanly if `skills/`, `agents/`, `hooks/`, `rules/`, `bin/`, or `lib/` changed
- [ ] New/changed `bin/` or `lib/` scripts covered by `tests/bats/` or `tests/python/`
